query: South Korea KOSPI foreign investor net buy/sell value weekly latest June 2026, recent trend in trillion won
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on **South Korea KOSPI foreign investor net buy/sell activity** through late June 2026:

## Bottom Line
Foreign investors were **massive net sellers** of KOSPI stocks in H1 2026 — a record "Sell Korea" of **~148–149 trillion won** — driven by profit-taking/rebalancing after the KOSPI roughly doubled (+~101–109% YTD) and a sharply weakening won.

## Latest Weekly/Daily Trend (the "recent trend")
The final weeks of June were dominated by intense selling with one brief interruption:
- **June 29 (record):** ~**7.73–7.76 trillion won** single-day foreign net sale — **largest since records began in Sept 2001**
- **June 19 onward:** 7–8 consecutive selling days
- **June 23:** KOSPI crashed **–9.99%** (circuit breaker); foreigners –5.80tn won
- **June 12 (reversal):** Foreigners net **bought ~1.7tn won** — first buying in 25 trading days — on Middle East ceasefire optimism (KOSPI +8%)
- **June 8:** Foreigners –1.24tn won intraday

## Monthly figures
- **May 2026:** –49.41tn won (KOSPI) — all-time monthly record
- **June 2026:** –48.62tn won
- Retail investors (+99tn) and institutions (+35tn) absorbed the selling; foreign ownership still hit a record **35.3%** on price gains.

**Data note:** The latest official FSS monthly report covers May 2026 (released June 26); the June FSS report was not yet published as of July 1, 2026. Weekly/daily figures come from Korea Exchange (KRX) trading data.
